title: Easy Xian简单修仙
body:
这是一个非常简单的修仙模组

This is a very simple mod.

模组仅添加了修仙的设定和一些可有可无的小技能

Allow players to continuously improve their various attributes.Mortal to Immortal!

推荐和[Colorful Hearts](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-hearts)一起使用

Recommended for use with [Colorful Hearts](https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-hearts)

模组的按键只有3个

Mod`s key

![Mod`s Key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff733301d7759c470161deeffea0be17db429b49_0.webp)

You’re free to drop this into any modpack—no need to ask or get permission—and recording videos is more than welcome.

可以自由随意的加入到整合包中，无须询问或申请，录制视频也非常的欢迎。

如何开始

How to start


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

如果你要开始修仙的话，首先要找到图书管理员

图书管理员会以3面包的价格出售一本古籍

If you want to started,you need to get the old book from librarian

![How to get the old book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b76e5e1ced196462ecec5c07065bef2163ed5f58.png)

右键古籍，有70%的概率成功阅读并领悟修行功法

Right click the old book,learn it!

领悟过后，玩家在击杀最大血量大于等于20的生物的时候，便能掠夺其部分生命上限

同时还会增加自身的各个属性

When you learn it,every time you kill a mob having 20 more max health, you can improve your abilities.
![The info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b92de57ee8ea65be616d7f60753747a912b10e3.png)

不同的境界会有不同的buff，能力，具体就不详细描述了，有点多，我懒得打了:D

Different levels have different abilities, but there are too many to list, and I`m a lazy man, I don't want to type them all.:D

</details>



模组的可调配置和其它

Here is the optional and something else


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![optional](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c455f93b95fd5b4120d9c397e4623b3e4b717f9.png)

模组会让所有生物，都有概率变成有修为的生物

This mod allows all the mobs to have a chance to be more powerful.

可以通过下方的配置，来调整对应修为的概率，或者使用gamerule指令

You can also change it.

![Mob`s optional](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fac29ab65bbd5ceedba1782b5a969b58764bd84.png)

【玄君七章秘经】不受配置文件影响，学成功了就永远不会消失

【Seven Cryptical Books of Hsan】Not affected by the optional, once learned, it will not disappear.

玄君七章秘经只能在大师级的精神错乱的炼丹师进行购买

Seven Cryptical Books of Hsan can only buy from Master Crazy alchemist

![How to get Seven Cryptical Books of Hsan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3927a5ab9eb998272aa9ce492657b553e239f899.png)

而精神错乱的炼丹师的工作方块则是紫晶丹炉

To do it,you need to creaft 1 Amethyst alchemy furnace

![Crazy alchemist](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f54195aa39e0ab43a21bcc388003c99dba6c9236.png)

右键玄君即可研读，有1%的概率成功，此书没有修为的人同样可以使用

Then right click it.

玄君有5个不同的技能

Seven Cryptical Books of Hsan has 5 different skills

火球 发射火球

Fire Ball:fire fire ball

瞬移 瞬移，瞬移的最大距离由玩家的当前血量决定

Teleport:Teleport，The maximum distance for teleportation is determined by the player's health.

飞昇 给予玩家30秒的观察者模式，在这个模式下，玩家照样可以切换技能，来使用其它的技能，时间一到就会回到原地

Spiritual transcendence:30s gamemode 3，When the time comes, it will return to its original place

雷击 劈雷，劈雷的距离同样是由玩家的当前血量决定

Lightning:The distance to summon lightning is also determined by the player's current health

自爆 清空玩家的一切修为进度，造成爆炸，玩家的修为境界越高，造成的爆炸就越大

Boom:Return players to their original values,Causing an explosion，The higher the player's level(mod`s level,not xp level), the greater the explosion caused.

</details>
